name: Participant Recruitment Strategy
consequences: Enhancing recruitment efforts will likely increase participant diversity → Systemic: 30% higher enrollment rates through expanded outreach → Strategic: Broader data applicability and improved generalizability of findings.

review: Controls Recruitment Speed vs. Participant Diversity. Weakness: The options fail to consider the potential impact of participant retention on overall study success.

review: Controls Data Quality vs. Participant Comfort. Weakness: The options do not adequately address the potential for participant fatigue from increased monitoring.
